name: r10h-sweep-draft-preview
rationale: Broker correction triggers Vienna to compose a draft preview email; F4.SW sweepBrokerFacingDraft must strip internal-review-tail patterns (mock-data signatures, internal-note artifacts) from the broker-facing draft. Tests that the sweep is APPLIED at saveDraftAndPreview call sites (per R10-H expansion to 8 sites). Without sweep, internal-review-tail content would leak to broker.
notes: Two-event sequence — intake + broker correction. Sweep applies on the draft-preview admin email generated after the correction. Assertion focus: broker-facing draft is clean of internal-review-tail patterns.
